nasb.text: Let the kings of Tarshish and of the islands bring presents; The kings of Sheba and Seba offer gifts.

esv.text: May the kings of Tarshish and of the coastlands render him tribute; may the kings of Sheba and Seba bring gifts!

cnv.text: 他施和海島的列王都必帶來禮物， 示巴和西巴的列王都必獻上貢物。

ccb.text: 愿他施、示巴和西巴的君王都来纳贡称臣。

csbs.text: 塔尔施和众海岛的君王们将带来贡物， 示巴和西拔的君王们将献上礼物。
